title: Help me create a new quote for a client in Workroo…

messages.content:
Hello! I'm **MAX**, your Empire AI Assistant.

_Tip: Ctrl+V to paste images · Shift+Enter for newlines_
Help me create a new quote for a client in WorkroomForge. green palletn riplefld drapery, channel back neadboard nad reuplster bench, quick quote

I can see the inspiration photo — beautiful **luxury master bedroom** with floor-to-ceiling drapery, a tufted headboard, and an upholstered bench. Let me build this quick quote now!

```tool
{"tool": "create_quick_quote", "customer_name": "Customer 1", "rooms": [{"name": "Master Bedroom", "windows": [{"name": "Left Window", "width": 72, "height": 108, "quantity": 1, "treatmentType": "ripplefold", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "track-ripplefold", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "wall"}, {"name": "Right Window", "width": 72, "height": 108, "quantity": 1, "treatmentType": "ripplefold", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "track-ripplefold", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "wall"}], "upholstery": [{"name": "Channel Back Headboard", "type": "headboard", "quantity": 1, "fabric_yards": 8}, {"name": "Bench Reupholster", "type": "bench", "quantity": 1, "fabric_yards": 4}]}], "max_analysis": "This master bedroom project calls for a lush green palette ripplefold drapery in a floor-to-ceiling installation — recommend a deep emerald or sage velvet for drama and richness. The channel back headboard reupholster should use a complementary green fabric with tight channel tufting for a luxury hotel aesthetic. The bench reupholster should tie the palette together, ideally in a tonal green or gold accent fabric. All three pieces should be executed in coordinating textiles for a cohesive, high-end result."}
```
